Photography

Below is a selection of pictures taken during a trip to Seoul, South Korea, in late 2019. Locations include Gangnam (강남구), Hongdae (홍대), the National Museum of Korea (국립중앙박물관), Namsan (남산), Changdeokgung Palace (창덕궁), and the Dongmyo (동묘) flea market.
